user.title: RNLI Lifeboat Launches
user.description: Choose the lifeboat station to monitor. The list shows stations with recent launches — if yours isn't listed, type its short name (as it appears on rnli.org, e.g. 'Tower').

error.cannot_connect: Could not fetch the station list from the RNLI API. You can still type a station name manually.
error.invalid_station: Please choose or enter a station name.

abort.already_configured: This lifeboat station is already configured.
